channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - www.gematsu.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: Capcom Platinum Titles sales update – as of March 31, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Big gains for the Resident Evil series.

Capcom has updated its list of “Platinum Titles“—games that have sold over one million units—providing total sales numbers as of March 31, 2026.

Notable updates include:

  • Resident Evil Requiem (PS5, Xbox Series, Switch 2, PC) has sold 6.9 million units (new release) (sales have since surpassed seven million)
  • Resident Evil 3 remake (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 13.3 million units (2.4 million additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Resident Evil 2 (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 18.3 million units (1.5 million additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Resident Evil 4 remake (PS5, PS4, Xbox Series, PC) has sold 13.6 million units (1.4 million additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Resident Evil Village (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 14.9 million units (1.4 million additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Resident Evil 7 biohazard (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 17.4 million units (one million additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Street Fighter 6 (PS5, PS4, Xbox Series, PC) has sold 6.7 million units (400,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter Rise: Sunbreak (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC) has sold 11.3 million units (400,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter Rise (PS5, Xbox Series, PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC) has sold 18.6 million units (400,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter Wilds (PS5, Xbox Series, PC) has sold 11.4 million units (400,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Devil May Cry 5 (PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 11.2 million units (200,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter World: Iceborne (PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 16 million units (100,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Dragon’s Dogma II (PS5, Xbox Series, PC) has sold 4.2 million units (100,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter: World (PS4, Xbox One, PC) has sold 22.1 million units (100,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Marvel vs. Capcom Fighting Collection: Arcade Classics (PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC) has sold 1.2 million units (100,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter Stories 2: Wings of Ruin (PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC) has sold 2.5 million units (100,000 additional units since December 31, 2025)
  • Monster Hunter Stories (PS4, Xbox One, Switch, PC, 3DS) has sold 1.1 million units (new to the Platinum Titles list)

Get the full updated list of Platinum Titles below.

ReleaseTitlePlatformMillion
units
1Jan 2018Monster Hunter: World
*Unit sales including Monster Hunter World: Iceborne Master Edition: 29.60 million units		PS4, Xbox One, PC, DL22.10*
2Mar 2021Monster Hunter RiseNSW, PS4, PS5, Xbox One, XSX, PC, DL18.60

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: RPG Maker U2U announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Worlds of depth, made with feeling.

Following a teaser in March, Gotcha Gotcha Games has officially announced RPG Maker U2U, the latest entry in the role-playing game creation software series for PC. A release date was not announced.

Here are the first details, via the official website:

■ New Features

New Visual Expression: P2D (Perspective 2D)

Add 3D depth and rich effect expression to conventional 2D maps!

By adopting a fixed perspective similar to the classic 2D RPG Maker view, you’ll draw players deeper into your imagination than ever before.

Create with Intuitive Controls P2D Map Editor

No specialized knowledge required! Easily create maps using a process very similar to the classic RPG Maker style.

  • Quick Creation – Just select pre-made objects from a list and place them into your map!
  • Detailed Creation – Create new objects from scratch!
  • Shape Creation – Combine blocks to create complex shapes, uneven terrain, and more!
  • Decorations – Add details and life to created objects by using your favorite map tiles as decorations.

Use RPG Maker 2D Assets!

2D assets from previous RPG Maker titles can be used as map tiles for decoration!

Additionally, more than 100 ready-to-use P2D maps are included to give you a quick start!

Stunning Visuals, Familiar Ease of Use

Unity Engine powers the P2D system’s rich sense of depth and beautiful effects.

However, we’ve created an interface that allows for quick and easy creation for users of all skill levels, retaining the familiar feel of that the Maker series is known for.

Watch a new trailer below.

Overview Trailer

English

Japanese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/rpg-maker-u2u-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Classic-style strategy RPG Tactics Wanderer announced for PC
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Inspired by Fire Emblem and Final Fantasy Tactics.

Bangkok-based one-man developer Critical Damage Studio has announced Tactics Wanderer, a classic-style strategy RPG inspired by games like Fire Emblem and Final Fantasy Tactics. It will launch for PC via Steam in Q4 2026 to Q1 2027.

Here is an overview of the game, via Critical Damage Studio:

About

Tactics Wanderer is a classic-style strategy RPG that emphasizes deep character customization and tactical decision-making. As the lead developer at Critical Damage Studio, I have poured my passion into creating a nostalgic yet fluid experience, featuring over 40 distinct classes and a gripping narrative.

Key Features

  • An Epic Journey – Navigate through a rich campaign featuring no less than 24 strategic chapters.
  • The Seven Heroes – Command seven main units, each with a deep progression tree. Evolve your characters through Tier 2, 3, and 4, with branching paths (two choices per tier) for every level.
  • Strategic Support – Utilize specialized support units, including Backpackers, Blacksmiths, and Bards, to turn the tide of battle.
  • Class Masterclass – Discover and master over 40 unique classes, allowing for endless tactical combinations.
  • Artistically Authentic – Entirely created by human hands—zero AI involvement.
  • ❮
  • ❯

Units and Combat Systems

  • Skill Customization – Beyond innate class skills, enhance your units by equipping Skill Rings. Combine these with class abilities to create devastating skill combos tailored to your playstyle.
  • Resource Management – Skills are divided into Active and Passive. Active skills require strategic use of Mana or Items as a cost to deliver immediate impact on the battlefield.
  • Equipment and Crafting – Standard weapons do not have a durability system and can be used indefinitely. However, powerful Masterwork weapons crafted by the Blacksmith offer superior stats but come with limited durability.
  • Challenge Your Strategy – There is no permanent death in the standard mode. However, for those seeking a challenge, Hard Mode features a “Zero Casualty” rule—if any player unit falls in battle, it is an immediate Game Over.

Story

After generations of conflict, the seven kingdoms of the Athelon continent finally united in peace. But the tranquility was shattered by the Armond, a mysterious and relentless race from an unknown land. Refusing all diplomacy, the Armond have besieged Athelon for years.In a desperate bid for survival, Athelon has formed elite expeditionary units to sail toward the unknown origin of their invaders.

Journey alongside seven Heroes from the seven Kingdoms to uncover the truth behind the Armond and find a way to end the war forever.

Watch the announcement trailer below. View the first screenshots at the gallery.

Announce Trailer

English

Japanese

Simplified Chinese



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/classic-style-strategy-rpg-tactics-wanderer-announced-for-pc
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Wandering Sword for PS5 delayed to January 21, 2027 alongside Xbox Series, Switch 2, and Switch versions
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Switch
  • Switch 2
  • Xbox Series

3D pixel Wuxia RPG delayed one week ahead of planned release.

Publishers Clouded Leopard Entertainment and Spiral Up Games, and developer The Swordman Studio will have delayed the PlayStation 5 version of 3D pixel Wuxia RPG Wandering Sword from its previously planned May 28 release date to January 21, 2027. The Switch 2 and Switch versions, which were previously planned to launch sometime after the PlayStation 5 version, will now launch alongside the PlayStation 5 version. A newly announced Xbox Series version will also launch that day.

According to Clouded Leopard Entertainment, the delay in release is due to adjustments in the release schedule for the physical edition.

Despite being dated and confirmed for a physical release back in November 2025, the PlayStation 5 version of Wandering Sword never went up for pre-order at any major retailers. Digital pre-orders are available via PlayStation Store.

Wandering Sword first launched for PC via Steam on September 15, 2023.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/wandering-sword-for-ps5-delayed-to-january-21-2027-alongside-xbox-series-switch-2-and-switch-versions
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Path of Mystery 2: The Mermaid Legend Murder Case announced for Switch 2, Switch
item.content:encoded:
• Switch
  • Switch 2

Due out in September in Japan.

Imagineer has announced mystery adventure game sequel Path of Mystery 2: The Mermaid Legend Murder Case for Switch 2 and Switch. It will launch in September in Japan for 4,980 yen. The Switch 2 version is a game-key card.

Here is a brief overview of the game:

About

“A mystery drama adventure that unfolds between the present and the past.”

The setting is Kamakura, a historic seaside town.

The protagonist, Doppo Akazawa, who possesses the ability to “see the past,” joins his fellow Mystery Research Club members of the in investigating an unsolved murder case that took place there 20 years ago. However, a new tragedy unfolds at the hands of an unknown culprit…

What truths await them…?

Enjoy a game experience unique to this title, featuring a distinctive atmosphere and full voice acting performed a talented and popular cast.

Cast

  • Doppo Akazawa (voiced by Yuuki Yonai)
  • Alice Nanjo (voiced by Yui Ishikawa)
  • Kagero Tono (voiced by Arthur Lounsbery)
  • Kotaro Izawa (voiced by Daiki Kobayashi)
  • Anna Mashiro (voiced by Yui Ogura)
  • Shoko Shimada (voiced by Maoko Saeki)
  • Mizuki Akazawa (voiced by Mayuka Tani)
  • Ui Horofude (voice actor to be announced)
  • Rumina Kashima (voice actor to be announced)

Watch the announcement trailer below.

Announce Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/05/path-of-mystery-2-the-mermaid-legend-murder-case-announced-for-switch-2-switch
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
